_comment: Place at .vscode/mcp.json in workspace, or merge into user settings.json under 'mcp'.
VS Code MCP schema differs from Claude: top-level key is 'servers' (not 'mcpServers') and 'type' is required.
Prereqs: install Blitz Bridge as a global tool (`dotnet tool install -g BlitzBridge.McpServer`).
Substitute: update --config path to your real profiles.json path.

Troubleshooting 'spawn <url> ENOENT': another MCP entry (workspace or user settings) is registering an HTTP url for the same name. Remove it via Command Palette > 'MCP: List Servers', then 'MCP: Restart Server'.
